metric_value: Rather extraverted; tends to be sociable and good at making and maintaining contacts
Well adjusted individual; finds life generally satisfying; achieves things considered most important
Keeps feelings under control when coming to balanced judgement; neither fiercely independent nor strongly conformist
Fairly good natured and inclined to be cooperative
Prefers to be direct, open and forthright; more likely to be trusted than less outspoken people; may not always be acceptable to others unless suitably tactful
Gets warmly involved with working groups; natural and spontaneous; takes life as it comes
May not be very good at coolly and objectively analysing people's motives; being natural and spontaneous limits objective people-analysis
Dominant individual; apt to be stern and authoritarian; assertive and independent-minded when opposed
Rather talkative and lively; tends to be an active communicator; somewhat adventurous and sociable
Prefers to work and make decisions with other people; seeks social approval and group support; sometimes at cost of conforming with others' wishes
Likes to take people at face value; not suspicious but not over-trusting
Resilient person; possesses mature, unanxious confidence in ability to deal with any kind of situation
notes: Key trait; aligns with 'Sailor's Temperament' in memoir

metric_value: Gives impression of being relaxed, composed and generally satisfied; may seem laid-back and lacking in motivation to others
Extremely relaxed style could lead to low performance unless kept under pressure to achieve results
Emotionally mature; copes well with frustrating circumstances; adjusts to realities of a situation; does not allow feelings to interfere with seeing things as they are
Tends to lack will-power and self-control
Attends to most moral standards and rules but prepared to ignore a regulation when it no longer seems to serve its purpose
notes: Pragmatic rather than dogmatic rule orientation

metric_value: Happier thinking about practical and concrete matters rather than abstract problems
notes: Practical orientation; aligns with 'Simple Physics' analytical approach

metric_value: Fascinated by ideas, theories and beliefs; rather interested in new ideas and changes; occasionally inclined to experiment
Often absorbed in work; tends to be unconventional; generally unfussy; likes to manage own affairs if possible
Effective as Resource Investigator; needs to widen circle of personal contacts; fascinated by new ideas; recognizes which could be of value to colleagues and clients
Possesses qualities of the Coordinator; capacity for controlling how team members work together toward common objectives; knows own mind; pushes ideas forward to superiors
notes: Dual team role: Resource Investigator + Coordinator

metric_value: May lack determination to see things through to completion; benefits from having a second-in-command who checks bright ideas can work in practice
Generally performs most effectively when kept under steady pressure
notes: Consistent with Coping with Pressure section findings
